title: Alune Season 1
description:
Alune is a Minecraft Survival Modpack

It was made for Multiplayer, but can also be used in Singleplayer.
It aims to Improve your Gameplay with Performance optimization, QOL changes and Fun features.
It is constantly beeing updated and maintained.
body:
![Alune](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06409d9fd64998d4e770b580cf7db2ac3134d4f1_0.webp)

### Information

Alune is a Survival Modpack for Multiplayer, but it can also be used in Singleplayer.
It aims to improve the Performance aswell as fixing bugs or ingame behaviour of different actions.
If you are looking for a Modpack which doesn't make you feel like playing a entirely new game you are at the right place.

## Features

- Performance Optimization such as [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) and [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium).
- Gameplay Optimization with [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling), [Do a barrel roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll)
- Different QOL changes with [Skin Shuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinshuffle), [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap), [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback), [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) and [Gamma-Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils)
- [Fancy Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu) Title Screen
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Bliss Shader](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) + [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) (To make it look beautiful)
- Already Configured to save you time!
- Game Version 1.21.1

### Support

- [Installation Guide](https://support.modrinth.com/en/articles/8802250-modpacks-on-modrinth)
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/Gn8wFBQK) (for questions)
